label: Profiling Static
description: Canonical ability tags from benchmark profiling. Stable reference, not the primary demo mode.

label: Survey Static
description: Survey taxonomy categories mapped onto benchmarks. Broad coverage with weaker score-pattern fit.

label: Fixed V-loop
description: Fixed capability taxonomy, then benchmark selection by relevance, redundancy, predictive gain, and cost.

label: Dynamic V-loop
description: Refines the taxonomy from model score patterns and rejects unstable axis edits.
